description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a global before_script that runs `env`, `pwd`, and `ls -la` for every job. Define a single stage called build and a job named build_project in that stage, tagged with ios and converse, that runs only on the master branch. In the job script execute `pod update`, then `xcodebuild clean -workspace converse.xcworkspace -scheme converse | xcpretty -s`, then `xcodebuild clean -workspace converse.xcworkspace -scheme converseApp | xcpretty -s`, and finally `xcodebuild test -workspace converse.xcworkspace -scheme converse -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro Max,OS=26.0.1' -enableCodeCoverage YES | xcpretty -s`. After the script, run the after_script command `slather coverage -s`. No Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
